category_sources: source_facts.description says osdctl is a CLI tool for managed OpenShift clusters; source_facts.homepage is the official openshift/osdctl repository.

docs_sources: Official openshift/osdctl GitHub repository provides the README and a docs directory; no separate dedicated documentation domain was identified.

tags_sources: source_facts.description states managed OpenShift clusters; source_facts.executables lists osdctl; official repository name is openshift/osdctl.
